title: GTA 7 leak supuesto · Tokio nocturno POV
logline: POV first-person inmersivo 10s sin diálogo. Caminar por Shibuya Crossing nocturno hiperreal lluvia neón, cámara virtual estilo Rockstar GTA cinematics + estética fotográfica Lance Acord (Lost in Translation 2003). HUD minimal acid #CFFF00 bottom-right minimap. Shot 2 cámara gira hacia arriba revelando koi/dragón holográfico magenta/cyan entre rascacielos = momento wow. La duda '¿es real, juego o IA?' es el motor viral.

references: Lost in Translation (2003) · dir. Sofia Coppola · DP Lance Acord (Tokyo Shibuya documentary feel)
Drive (2011) · dir. Refn · DP Newton Thomas Sigel (neon rain Sony F35)
John Wick: Chapter 4 (2023) · DP Dan Laustsen (urban neon-rain reference)
Cyberpunk 2077 + Edgerunners (CD Projekt Red · REDengine 4 ray tracing post patch 1.5)
GTA V Los Santos cinematics + GTA VI Vice City trailer 2023 (Rockstar RAGE engine)
dp_references: Lance Acord (Lost in Translation Tokyo · Zeiss Master Anamorphic 40mm T2.1 documented American Cinematographer 2003)
Newton Thomas Sigel (Drive 2011 neon rain Sony F35 · Panavision C Series 40mm anamorphic)
Dan Laustsen (John Wick 4 urban neon · Cooke S4/i Prime 32mm 50mm anamorphic)
lens_specs: POV first-person walking equivalente: Cooke S4/i 32mm prime spherical (NO anamorphic POV would feel wrong)
Aperture: f/2.8 ISO equivalent 3200 (low-light night documented Sigel/Acord)
Long exposure NIGHT effect: motion blur per-object 12ms equivalent (GTA V cinematics technical wiki)
FOV POV: 45-50° (GTA V cinematics modding community reference, NO oficial Rockstar)
Subtle head bobbing +2° vertical lerp · walking pace 1.4 m/s natural human gait
research.lut_reference: Cyberpunk 2077 Night City Westbrook district reference · saturation +18% magenta and cyan channels selectively · highlights pushed neon (volumetric halo on signs) · blacks lifted +12 IRE (street wet asphalt detail) · subsurface scattering on neon signage glow · anime-influenced post-production saturation shift Edgerunners · long exposure trail capture on car headlights (1/4-1/8s equivalent ISO 800-3200 documented Drive Sigel + Lost in Translation Acord)
research.pacing_template: POV immersive · 10s total (sin outro) · 2 shots largos (5s + 5s) · NO cuts agresivos · solo head turn lerp suave entre shots · cero match cuts · sensación gameplay continuo · contemplativo no kinetic
audio_references: Cyberpunk 2077 score · P. T. Adamczyk + Marcin Przybyłowicz · synthwave + drum'n'bass 120-130 BPM
Akira (1987) Otomo soundtrack · taiko atmospheric tracks · cyberpunk Tokyo ambient
Diegetic dominant: rain heavy continuous · Tokyo Shibuya crowd murmur low · neon sign electric buzz pan stereo · steam manhole hiss · distant traffic bass
Music ambient/atmospheric · NO percussive · pad-driven cinematic · ethereal whoosh on holographic koi reveal shot 2
LUFS target -16 cinema · subgrave 40Hz constant under crowd ambient (subliminal psychological pressure)
research_sources: American Cinematographer 2003 · Lance Acord Lost in Translation interview
American Cinematographer 2012 · Newton Thomas Sigel Drive feature
CD Projekt Red GDC 2020 lighting architecture presentation
GTA modding technical wikis (gtalib.com · NO oficial Rockstar)
Variety + IndieWire John Wick 4 cinematography analysis 2023

shots.structure_role: POV walking Shibuya Crossing immersive · 5s continuous no cuts · GTA V cinematic foundation
shots.prompt: POV first person walking pace 1.4 m/s at child-adult eye-level 170cm through Shibuya Crossing Tokyo at night during heavy rain, dense crowd of pedestrians crossing in parallel and oncoming, neon billboards verticales magenta and cyan reflecting in wet asphalt with long exposure trail capture style Drive Newton Thomas Sigel reference, subtle head bobbing +2 degrees vertical natural gait cycle, motion blur per-object 12ms GTA V cinematics technical foundation, FOV 45-50 degrees POV first-person, hyper-realistic video game cinematic style PS6 Cyberpunk 2077 REDengine 4 ray tracing quality (post patch 1.5 documented), Lance Acord Lost in Translation Tokyo Shibuya documentary feel reference, anime billboards in Japanese with NO readable kanji or letters (IA fallaría), Cooke S4/i 32mm spherical lens equivalent f/2.8 ISO 3200 low-light night, vertical 9:16 native framing (NOT letterboxed for gameplay sensation), photorealistic 8K, no faces clearly visible, no logos, no text overlay yet (HUD applied in post)
shots.negative_prompt: low quality, generic stock, watermark, readable kanji or japanese text, smiling faces, daytime, cleaned up plastic look, oversaturated cyberpunk anime 2D explicit, anamorphic letterbox black bars, wide shot 3rd person
validation_must_have: rain heavy continuous on wet asphalt with neon reflections
long exposure trail capture en luces (Drive style)

shots.structure_role: POV head-turn-up reveal · holographic koi/dragon between skyscrapers · WOW moment · transition to outro
shots.prompt: POV first person continuation, camera turns slowly upward 0-60 degrees over 3 seconds revealing massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air between Tokyo skyscrapers, neon magenta and acid green glow #FF00FF #CFFF00 emanating from the holographic koi, hyper-realistic game cinematic Cyberpunk 2077 Night City Westbrook district reference, vertical 9:16 native gameplay framing, rain falling diagonally cutting through neon light shafts volumetric, motion blur subtle on rain particles, anamorphic-style lens flare on neon billboards (post effect, lens itself spherical 32mm equivalent), Lance Acord Lost in Translation melancólico Tokyo aesthetic mixed with Cyberpunk Edgerunners saturation +18% magenta/cyan channels, photorealistic PS6 quality with REDengine 4 ray tracing on neon volumetric halo subsurface scattering, no readable text on signs, no readable kanji, no faces visible, no logos
shots.negative_prompt: watermark, low quality, generic stock, daytime, smiling faces, readable kanji, anime 2D explicit Akira style, fast camera turn, abrupt cut, cleaned up plastic CGI look
validation_must_have: holographic koi visible mid-frame between skyscrapers
rain particles volumetric in light shafts

music.suno_keywords: Cyberpunk 2077 P. T. Adamczyk Marcin Przybylowicz synthwave atmospheric Tokyo cyberpunk ambient pad-driven Akira taiko distant rain night ethereal
music.tempo_bpm: slow drone 70bpm · pad-driven · no perceptible beat · ethereal swell on koi reveal

hud_overlay.minimap_style: circular acid green wireframe #CFFF00 60% opacity radius 70px · 80px from edge safe
hud_overlay.minimap_content: 1 dot pulsando 2Hz (player) + 4 dots distantes static (NPCs) · NO labels NO compass NO stamina bar NO ammo
hud_overlay.design_intent: HUD MUY sutil · vendemos la duda no afirmamos juego · si parece demasiado HUD = MAL

caption_text:
Esto se filtró ayer.
Spoiler: no es real. Lo hice yo.

Me pasé 22 minutos para que pareciera GTA 7. ¿Cuánto te tardó pensar que lo era?

Stack: Cinema Studio Video 3.0 + Suno + ffmpeg
Coste real: ~$1,00

A Rockstar le toma 8 años hacer un juego.
A mí 22 minutos hacer que parezca uno.
(Sí, faltan los gameplay loops. Y todo lo demás. Pero la VIBE está.)

14 días gratis en bio. Sin tarjeta.

approval_required.reason: tier=top × 2 shots video premium · suma ~$1.00 · POV con multitud requiere SOTA

validation_checklist_extra: técnica Lance Acord citada (Tokyo Shibuya documentary feel · Zeiss Master Anamorphic 40mm reference adaptado a spherical 32mm POV)
técnica Newton Thomas Sigel citada (long exposure neon rain Drive style)
GTA V cinematics technical (FOV 45-50 · head bobbing · motion blur per-object) · disclaimer: NO oficial Rockstar
Cyberpunk 2077 REDengine 4 ray tracing referencia (post patch 1.5)
vertical 9:16 NATIVO ambos shots (NO letterbox, queremos gameplay sensation)
HUD minimap MUY sutil (60% opacity · sin labels)
outro Dark Room a partir del segundo 10
